title: Kimi K2.7-Code: open-source coding model with better token efficiency
summary: Kimi K2.7-Code 是一个开源的编程模型，具有更高的 token 效率，适合代码生成任务。

title: How to setup a local coding agent on macOS
summary: 这篇帖子介绍了如何在 macOS 上配置本地编程助手，提供实用步骤和工具推荐。

title: Pirates, a naval warfare game inspired by Sid Meier's Pirates
summary: 这是一款受席德·梅尔《海盗》启发的海战游戏，玩家可以体验海盗冒险和海上战斗。

title: Slightly reducing the sloppiness of AI generated front end
summary: 该帖子探讨了如何通过微调减少AI生成前端代码的粗糙度，分享了具体方法和效果。

title: Maxproof
summary: 该帖子介绍了一篇名为《Maxproof》的论文，探讨了在逻辑和数学证明中最大化证明效率的新方法。

title: There Is Life Before Main in Rust
summary: 这篇帖子探讨了Rust语言中`main`函数执行前的程序生命周期，揭示了Rust在程序启动阶段隐藏的初始化机制和底层细节。

title: Show HN: Turn your name into a tree in an infinite procedural shanshui landscape
text:
Hi HN! I made this after collecting hundreds of "name → tree" submissions at ITP.

Live: https://landscape.bairui.dev/ Source: https://github.com/pearmini/infinite-landscape Plant a tree: https://tree.bairui.dev/

Pan and zoom an infinite procedural landscape. Each name is converted to ASCII codes, which grow into a unique tree (breadth-first branching; repeated digits become mathematical roses). Mountains use midpoint displacement + Perlin noise, with SVG radial gradients in the blue/green/gold palette from Wang Ximeng's "A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains."

Inspired by Lingdong Huang's {Shan, Shui}* (https://github.com/LingDong-/shan-shui-inf). Every tree is someone's name, signed with an APack stamp (https://apack.bairui.dev/).

Try planting your name, then pan along the ridgeline to find it. "My trees" lets you jump back to ones you planted.

Happy to answer questions about the terrain algo, name→tree encoding, or the Riso print we tiled at ITP Winter Show!
summary: 这个Hacker News帖子展示了一个创意项目：将用户名字转化为独特树木，并融入无限生成的中国山水风格景观中，支持缩放和探索，技术亮点包括ASCII编码生成树木算法和程序化山脉渲染。

title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
summary: AI代理在扫描DN42网络时因配置错误导致运营商破产，揭示了自动化系统的潜在风险。
